classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域是全图中标注为'17 PIN Encoder Connector'的针脚分配表，表内按Pin、Fuction、COLOR列出1至17号针脚，对应'DC+5V'、'GND'、'A'、'/A'、'B'、'/B'、'Z'、'/Z'、'U'、'/U'、'V'、'/V'、'W'、'/W'等编码器反馈信号及线色，属于反馈连接器针脚定义。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标区域是6针电源连接器的针脚表，表头包含'Pin'、'Function'、'COLOR'，并给出1到6号针脚与'U'、'V'、'W'、'PE'、'NC'及线色'YELLOW'、'RED'、'BLACK'、'YELLOW/GREEN'的对应关系，属于动力相线和保护地接线定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为圆形17针连接器端面外形及针位编号示意，文字包含连接器型号'YL221ZJ'和'17 PIN'，但未显示针脚功能、线色或信号定义，因此按连接器物理外形与位置示意归入机械尺寸类。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为圆形6针连接器外形和针位示意，包含型号'YL2046ZJ-Y'与'6 PIN'，仅显示孔位编号1至6和连接器结构轮廓，未在目标框内给出针脚功能、线色或接线对应关系，因此归入机械结构/外形位置类。

text_annotations.ambiguity_note: Top-center numeral inside the upper circle; box fits the visible glyph only.
Upper-right numeral inside its small circle; box excludes the circle border.
Upper-left numeral inside its small circle; box follows the printed digit.
Center numeral inside the middle circle; tight box around the glyph.
Lower-right numeral inside the circle; box stays clear of the ring.
Lower-left numeral inside the circle; box is tight to the visible glyph.

language_processing_rules.unit_rule: Assume millimeters only when explicit mechanical dimensions are visible; none are visible here

Use Connector / Cable Interface for the visible connector face
Do not convert context-only labels into source text

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为电机'Tecnical Data'参数表，包含极数、功率、扭矩、转速、电流、惯量、重量、防护等级等整机规格，未呈现连接器针脚定义或扭矩-转速曲线；在现有类别中最接近机械尺寸/整机机械参数类。

classification.reason: 目标区域是电机外形与端面安装结构图，包含轴径、轴长、机身长度、法兰尺寸、安装孔和孔距等尺寸标注，如 '226±1.5'、'63±1'、'φ165±0.1'、'4-φ11'、'M8 Deep 25'。虽然标出 '6 PIN MOTOR CONNECTOR' 和 '17 PIN ENCODER CONNECTOR' 的安装位置，但没有针脚功能或线色定义，因此归为机械尺寸。

title.title_en: Motor Outline and Mounting Dimensions Drawing

text_annotations.correction_note: Restored diameter symbol visible in drawing.
Corrected $ to φ and normalized unilateral tolerance from visible vertical callout.
Corrected split/rotated OCR into diameter callout with upper 0 and lower -0.016 tolerance.
Restored diameter symbol visible in drawing; overlapping duplicate OCR was discarded.

terminology_notes: φ is normalized as diameter symbol.
Deep is interpreted as hole/thread depth.
translation_notes: English connector labels are preserved and spaced for readability.

dimension_records.reason: Leader text identifies the motor connector on the top of the front view.
Leader text identifies the encoder connector on the top of the front view.
Small end-shaft detail shows a vertical keyway-related dimension.
Top small detail gives the horizontal slot/key feature length.
Small end-shaft detail shows the keyway width.
Visible leader/index number for a motor body feature; no dimensional value is associated.
Diameter callout points to the front-face circular mounting feature.
Horizontal dimension from shaft end feature to shoulder indicates shaft extension/feature length.
Small horizontal dimension at shaft shoulder.
Vertical envelope dimension on side view.
Vertical diameter tolerance callout at the left side of the shaft/flange region.
Vertical shaft diameter tolerance callout; OCR was split and partially misread.
Leader points to threaded mounting holes on front face.
Depth text belongs to the adjacent M8 threaded hole callout.
Horizontal shaft-side dimension between shoulder and referenced face.
Small horizontal dimension near front flange/shaft end interface.
Front view callout identifies four mounting holes; overlapping duplicate OCR was removed.
Angular dimension on right side of front view.
Small horizontal dimension at the front mounting flange.
Angular dimension on lower-left side of front view.
Bottom horizontal dimension gives main motor body length.
Bottom horizontal dimension from shaft end to mounting face.
Bottom front-view dimension indicates square mounting pattern spacing.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Front flange includes φ165±0.1 pilot/register, φ130 0/-0.04 register callout, 4-φ11 mounting holes, M8 threaded holes with depth 25, 2-150 mounting spacing, and 45° angular hole references.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Output shaft is φ32 0/-0.016 with shaft/key-related dimensions 50, 58±0.1, 63±1, 5, 3.5, 8, and 10 visible in the shaft detail area.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Main body length is 226±1.5 and maximum overall height is 174MAX.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Top connectors are labeled 6 PIN MOTOR CONNECTOR and 17 PIN ENCODER CONNECTOR.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Leader item number 1 is visible in the drawing but has no reliable OCR source_id in the provided source boxes, so it was not output as a text annotation.

unresolved_items.description: Visible leader/index number 1 appears on the side view, but no corresponding OCR source_id is provided.
unresolved_items.reason: Cannot create a final annotation without an OCR source_id.

unresolved_items.description: OCR source ocr_019 reads -11 and overlaps the 4-φ11 callout.
unresolved_items.reason: Discarded as duplicate partial OCR of ocr_018 rather than a separate engineering annotation.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框内是电机扭矩与转速关系图，横轴标注'n (rpm)'，纵轴标注'T (N.m)'，包含'Intermittent'和'Continuous'两条工作区曲线，并标出30.25、27.5、12.1、11.1、3800等关键扭矩和转速点。

Merged split OCR fragments into the visible curve label.

terminology_notes: The chart uses T for torque and n for rotational speed.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于完整图纸右下角表格的'Rating conditions'区域，内容包含'Mounting'和'Aluminium flange 457x457x12.7mm'，描述安装法兰材料及尺寸，属于机械安装尺寸信息；同时包含温升条件但不涉及曲线或连接器针脚定义，因此最接近机械尺寸类。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于整张机械图右下标题栏的公差说明区域，包含'UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED'、'TOLERANCES:'、小数位公差'.X ±0.5'、'.XX ±0.25'、'.XXX ±0.1'、角度公差'±0°30''以及'UNIT: mm'，用于规定机械尺寸未注公差，最符合机械尺寸类。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
